kw.name: Open Browser

kw.name: When User Verifies Homepage Loads Correctly
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Test Case 001: Verify that the Cdiscount homepage loads correctly with all main elements visible

test.name: TC_003 Add Article To Cart

kw.name: And User Selects First Product From Results
And User Adds Product To Cart

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Test Case 003: Verify that a product can be added to cart with confirmation message
